items.caption: A collection of graphic design concepts for a company named centro build. the designs are showcased in a collage format, featuring a logo with a geometric design, a business card mockup, and a wall decal. the logo consists of a gray and orange color scheme with the text "centro build" prominently displayed. the business card design includes a placeholder for a name and contact information, while the wall decal shows how the logo could be applied to a surface. the overall style of the image is modern and professional, with a focus on branding and corporate identity.
